title: goeppertia communis
intro: Goeppertia communis, also known as Calathea makoyana, is a species of plant in the family Marantaceae, commonly referred to as a decorative houseplant due to its attractive foliage. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Goeppertia communis include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
